name: Venison Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Sear venison until brown on all sides.
2. Add water to the pot and bring to a simmer.
3. Add celery, carrots, potatoes, and onions, then all other ingredients except frozen vegetables.
4. Cook on medium heat until vegetables are tender and meat is cooked through.
5. Stir in the frozen vegetables and cook until hot.
6. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
7. Serve with hard rolls if desired; additional broth may be needed.
